ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album where the song is included */,
  "preview_url" TEXT /* URL for previewing the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the song */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Whether the song contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Record label that published the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_counts" (
  "play_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play count record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being played */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the song has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the song was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_counts_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user, on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist song record */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist that the song is in */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song in the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song genre record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that the genre is associated with */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre associated with the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_genres_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_albums" (
  "artist_album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist album record */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist that the album is associated with */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album associated with the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_albums_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
